title: railliardia herbstobatae
intro: Railliardia herbstobatae is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the Ma'o hau hele, which is Hawaiian for "yellow hibiscus". The plant has been used in traditional Hawaiian medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Railliardia herbstobatae include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Railliardia herbstobatae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves, which are typically used to treat various ailments, and it is also used as a natural dye.
